name: Chiu Ting Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Chiu Ting Machinery Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells bench top and stationery woodworking machinery worldwide. It offers table saw, parallelogram jointer, and snipe planer series products. The company sells its products to importers, distributors, and retailers. Chiu Ting Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
